planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 now inserts a support/ZMP/slip recapture hold between visible descent and terminal stand-up recovery.

perspectives.product: tries to preserve exp84's 8cm+knee/contact/slip progress while making the crouch recoverable
perspectives.architecture: monkeypatches exp67 WBC-lite candidate selection with descend, recapture, and stand phase modes
perspectives.security: no credentials or external side effects
perspectives.qa: native sweep records raw JSON and visible gate metrics per three-phase variant
perspectives.skeptic: short-horizon recapture costs may still miss delayed collapse after stand-up starts

dod: raw native JSON per horizon variant
summary states whether any variant passes visible_8cm_gate

sources.note: ZMP must remain in the support polygon, motivating explicit recapture before terminal stand-up.
Capture point frames balance recovery as stopping divergent CoM dynamics before changing posture.
Squat motion study combines trajectory optimization and WBC instead of using a single monolithic tracking objective.
